description: Casos con estructura idéntica y significado diferente para calibrar la capa semántica de Query Memory V2.

memories.normalized_question: Listar transportistas ordenados de mayor a menor por tasa de cumplimiento de entrega.
memories.sql: SELECT carrier_name, on_time_rate FROM carriers ORDER BY on_time_rate DESC;

memories.normalized_question: Listar transportistas ordenados de menor a mayor por tasa de cumplimiento de entrega.
memories.sql: SELECT carrier_name, on_time_rate FROM carriers ORDER BY on_time_rate ASC;

memories.original_question: ¿Cuál fue la facturación total mensual en São Paulo durante 2018?
memories.normalized_question: Calcular la suma mensual de ingresos por ventas en São Paulo durante 2018.
memories.sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', sale_date) AS month, SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue FROM sales WHERE state = 'SP' AND sale_date >= '2018-01-01' AND sale_date < '2019-01-01' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

memories.original_question: ¿Cuál fue la facturación promedio mensual en São Paulo durante 2018?
memories.normalized_question: Calcular el promedio mensual de ingresos por ventas en São Paulo durante 2018.
memories.sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', sale_date) AS month, AVG(revenue) AS average_revenue FROM sales WHERE state = 'SP' AND sale_date >= '2018-01-01' AND sale_date < '2019-01-01' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

memories.normalized_question: Contar mensualmente los tickets de soporte abiertos o pendientes.
memories.sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) AS month, COUNT(*) AS ticket_count FROM support_tickets WHERE status IN ('open', 'pending') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

memories.normalized_question: Contar mensualmente los tickets de soporte resueltos.
memories.sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', resolved_at) AS month, COUNT(*) AS ticket_count FROM support_tickets WHERE status = 'resolved' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
